---
title: "Reference Library"
---

The reference library is a collection of resources that we have found useful 
for doing science. This is not an exhaustive list, but it is a good starting 
point for anyone who is new to the lab or wants to learn more about our 
workflow.

We encourage readers to explore these resources and add to this list as they
find new ones!

🚦🚧 This section is under construction 🚧🚦

<!-- 
## Core workflow references

{{< include "03_references/core_workflow.md" >}}

## FASRC and Harvard infrastructure

{{< include "03_references/fasrc_harvard.md" >}}

## NSAPH Handbook

{{< include "03_references/nsaph.md" >}}

## Publishing and documentation tooling

{{< include "03_references/publishing_and_docs.md" >}}
 -->
